data.body:
## Description
Add 4 behavioral tests to tests/hooks/test-pre-commit-test-gate.sh:

1. test_gate_merge_filters_incoming_only_files — Create main with initial commit, checkout -b worktree, switch to main, add 3 files, commit, switch to worktree, git merge --no-commit main (creates MERGE_HEAD), assert hook exits 0 (incoming-only files need no test-gate-status)
2. test_gate_merge_keeps_worktree_branch_files — Same setup but worktree also modifies a file that main changed, assert hook enforces tests for that file (exit 1 without test-gate-status)
3. test_gate_merge_failsafe_on_bad_merge_head — Write corrupt MERGE_HEAD (deadbeef), assert hook falls through to normal enforcement (exit 1 for missing test-gate-status)
4. test_gate_non_merge_commit_unchanged — Normal commit (no MERGE_HEAD) with staged files, assert hook enforces normally (guards against regression)

Each test creates an isolated temp repo via mktemp -d. All 4 tests must FAIL (RED) because pre-commit-test-gate.sh has no merge filtering logic yet.

## TDD Requirement
All tests must fail before Task 2 implementation.

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] 4 new test functions exist with test_gate_merge_ or test_gate_non_merge_ prefix
  Verify: grep -c 'test_gate_merge_\|test_gate_non_merge_' tests/hooks/test-pre-commit-test-gate.sh
- [ ] Each test creates an isolated temp repo
  Verify: Each test function contains mktemp -d
